title: thlaspi alpestre subsp. vogesiacum
intro: Thlaspi alpestre subsp. vogesiacum, also known as Vosges penny-cress or Vosges rockcress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and high blood pressure. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. Thlaspi alpestre subsp. vogesiacum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
